resources.string: Tap registered. Live gaze tracking is now using that target position.
Center your face, then look at and tap the middle target to capture calibration.

Step 1 of 2: Center your face in the preview and keep both eyes visible.\n\nStep 2 of 2: After tapping Start, look at the center target and tap it while keeping both your head and phone as steady as possible.
Look at the center target and tap it to capture calibration
Center your face, make sure both eyes stay visible, then press Start. When the target appears, look at it and tap it to capture calibration.
Look at and tap the center target
Tap the button above to grant Camera permission. If permission was permanently denied, open the app settings and enable Camera.

Inference: -- ms
Resolution: --
Calibration samples: --
Face conf: -- left: -- right: --
Pose: yaw=-- pitch=-- roll=--
Anchors: nose=(--, --) eyes=(--, --)
Raw gaze: --
Smooth gaze: --
Scale correction: --
Align your face with the screen so both eyes stay visible.
Front camera ready. Hold the phone comfortably and look naturally at the screen.
No face detected. Center one face in the preview.
Camera permission is required to track gaze.
